Who must sign your Certification of Work Experience form?
options: Someone with firsthand knowledge of your work, such as a licensed contractor or supervisor

m1-s2.question: What happens if you submit an incomplete or unsigned license application?
options: It is ignored but processed later
It may be returned or voided, delaying or forfeiting your application

m1-s2.question: Which two exams are required to receive your B-2 license?
options: Both Law and Business and B-2 trade exams

m1-s2.question: What must you submit within 90 days of passing your exams to activate your license?
options: License activation fee, contractor bond, and insurance documentation

m1-s3.question: Why do many qualified contractors fail the B-2 exam on the first try?
options: They underestimate the exam and fail to prepare with a structured study plan
CSLB wants to limit the number of contractors

m1-s3.question: What is the benefit of taking a diagnostic practice test before you start studying?
options: It allows you to bypass the real test
It helps identify your strengths and weaknesses so you can focus your study time effectively

m1-s3.question: How much consistent study time is typically recommended for most applicants?
options: Four to six weeks of steady preparation with 1–2 hours a day
At least a year of full-time studying

m1-s3.question: Why are full-length timed practice exams important?
options: They are optional and add no real value
They help you build stamina, manage time, and reduce anxiety for the real test
They count toward your final score with CSLB

m1-s3.question: Which approach leads to better retention of information?
options: Long cram sessions every few days
Short, consistent daily study sessions using multiple tools
Only reading the CSLB manual once

m1-s4.question: What does an acknowledgment letter from CSLB mean?
options: CSLB has received and entered your application for processing

m1-s4.question: How long does it usually take to receive an acknowledgment letter after applying?
options: About two to three weeks, though it can vary

m1-s4.question: What is one of the most common instructions in an acknowledgment letter?
options: Skip fingerprinting until after the exam
Complete Live Scan fingerprinting promptly to move forward
Begin working as a contractor immediately

m1-s4.question: What should you do if you see incorrect information in your acknowledgment letter?
options: Contact CSLB immediately to correct errors
Wait until after you pass the exam to fix it

m1-s4.question: Why is it important to read every CSLB letter carefully?
options: They may contain deadlines or requests that, if missed, delay or void your application
They are optional and mostly informational

m1-s5.question: What is the purpose of the Notice to Appear for Examination?
options: To confirm you’ve passed the exams
To inform you of your scheduled exam time, date, and location

m1-s5.question: What score is required to pass each CSLB exam?
Which of these should you bring to the exam?
options: A valid government-issued photo ID matching your application name
Study notes for reference during the test

m1-s5.question: What should you do if you’re unsure of an answer during the exam?
options: Flag it, make your best guess, and return to it later
Spend as long as needed until you’re certain

m1-s5.question: What can happen if you arrive late for your scheduled exam time?
options: Nothing; you can still take it
You may be denied entry and forced to reschedule, delaying your license
The exam will be postponed automatically

m1-s6.question: What is the purpose of the $15,000 contractor’s bond?
options: To protect the contractor from lawsuits
To protect clients and the public from damages or violations caused by the contractor

m1-s6.question: What must you do if you plan to have employees?
options: Nothing until your license is active

options: CSLB gives unlimited time to respond

m1-s6.question: Which document must be displayed in your office or workspace once you are licensed?
options: The CSLB wall certificate of licensure

m1-s6.question: What can cause an active license to be suspended automatically?
options: Failing to answer calls from CSLB
Letting your bond or required insurance lapse
